---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working correctly
labels: bug
---

**What did you ask Claude Code to sweep?**
<!-- e.g. "All focus areas on a Rust web service with ~25 .rs files using SeaORM" -->

**Which focus areas were selected?**
<!-- e.g. "All", or "Logic & Data Sources, Async & Concurrency" -->

**What went wrong?**
<!-- Describe the issue: missed a real bug, false positive, wrong severity, wrong focus area tag, crash during subagent dispatch, etc. -->

**Expected behavior**
<!-- What should have happened instead? -->

**Claude Code version**
<!-- Run `claude --version` and paste the output -->

**Additional context**
<!-- Error messages, the generated report (if partial), relevant code snippets -->
